case_title: SCOTT AMIDZICH VS. WEST GROUP REAL ESTATE, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO SEP-08-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-10-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY JR, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WEST GROUP REAL ESTATE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMIDZICH, SCOTT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEST GROUP REAL ESTATE, INC. MONTGOMERY JR, JOHN CLAIM CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE # 825898. CASE #825908 DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2008 - CONTINUED FOR TRIAL TO OCT-10-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD JOHN MONTGOMERY, JR. AS A PARTY DEFENDANT. IF DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY DOES NOT ACCEPT OR WAIVE SERVICE OF THE AMENDED CLAIM, PLAINTIFF SHALL COMPLETE TIMELY SERVICE PRIOR TO OCTOBER 10, 2008 TRIAL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: EDWARD HOLTZ. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
